name: outpost
description: AI-first deployment harness with Mothership, Outpost daemon, and Beacon relay.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/protocol packages/shared packages/daemon packages/beacon packages/mothership
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false packages/protocol packages/shared packages/daemon packages/beacon packages/mothership
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean packages/protocol packages/shared packages/daemon packages/beacon packages/mothership
scripts.test-mothership: node -e "import('node:http').then((http) => http.get('http://127.0.0.1:4173', (res) => { console.log('STATUS:', res.statusCode); process.exit(0); }).on('error', (e) => { console.error('ERROR', e); process.exit(1); }))"
